_metadata.purpose: Site-specific input for groundwater impact evaluation supporting a TCEQ Ch. 285 OSSF setback waiver request.
_metadata.narrative_link: Each field below corresponds to a clause in the standard waiver narrative: soil_type -> 'low to moderate Ksat'; receptor distances -> 'increased contact time'; treatment -> 'aerobic system with disinfection'; gradient -> 'velocity of subsurface flow'.

subsurface._gradient_note: Typical shallow gradient for flat coastal-plain Texas sites; verify with on-site piezometers if required.

source.description: Aerobic treatment unit (ATU) secondary effluent + chlorine disinfection, surface application via spray distribution.
source._constituents_note: Source concentrations default to data/pathogens.json typical_C0_post_disinfection unless overridden here.

receptors.name: Existing private water well (on-site)
receptors._distance_note: 100 ft - this is the TCEQ minimum setback being evaluated

comparison_scenarios._purpose: Run the same effluent against alternative soils to show the 'in contrast, highly permeable soils...' clause from the narrative.
